headline: Crypto-Powered Search Engine To Be Preinstalled On All EU's Android Phones, Coin Up 100%
summary:
Decentralized search engine Presearch (CRYPTO: PRE) is now a default search engine option on all new and factory-reset Android devices sold in the United Kingdom and European Union.

What Happened: According to a recent Cointelegraph report, the inclusion of Presearch became effective on Sept 1.
